name: DRC Systems India Limited
summary: DRC Systems India Limited, a software development company, offers IT business solutions worldwide. It provides consultancy and discovery workshop services, and dedicated developers; UI/UX, wireframe, and frontend design services; web, mobile app, development content management system, digital commerce/e-commerce, and eLearning services; blockchain, big data, engineering, and IOT services; and cyber security, manual testing, automation testing, and performance testing services. It also offers DevOps and cloud, salesforce, and support and maintenance services; data analytics, and AI & automation transformation services; and enterprise resource planning, enterprise, digital marketing, and digital process automation solutions. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Gandhinagar, India.
